statement: NVIDIA still holds about 70% of the AI chip market, but that share is projected to erode as custom ASIC shipments (projected 27.8% of the market in 2026) grow 44.6% year over year versus 16.1% for merchant GPUs.
why: Hyperscaler custom silicon is growing far faster than merchant GPUs and is projected to take share from NVIDIA.

impact.mechanism: Faster ASIC growth erodes merchant-GPU market share while lifting hyperscaler ASIC share.

evidence.source: Tom's Hardware custom AI ASIC state of play
evidence.excerpt: Nvidia still holds approximately 70% of the AI chip market share, but that share is projected to erode

confidence.basis: Secondary trade-press feature; share figures attributed to TrendForce within one document.
